/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/eeg_gui_cpp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/signalview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eeg_gui_cpp.dir/imageview.cpp.o -o eeg_gui_cpp  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
